cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

passive.desc: +1 save vs. spells at lv1, then every 5 levels
+1 AC vs. melee at lv1, then every 6 levels

activated.effects: Single target, 1d3 rounds. Save penalty scales from +4 (lv1) to -10 (lv45). Caster takes -3 AC and -25% movement for 1 round.
Multi-target (2 at lv1, +1 per 10 levels). Save from +7 (lv1) to -5 (lv49).
Recruits a charmed/dominated target to the party. Target max half caster level.
Backstab enhancement: instant death on failed save vs death (-2, -1 per 4 levels). Min 2d6 scaling damage.

restrictions.items: Only 15 skill pts/level. Cannot detect or set traps. Backstab capped at x2. d4 HP/level. No Use Any Item HLA. Requires INT 13, WIS 15, CHA 17 for dual-class.

hlaPool.note: Psionic HLAs replace standard thief HLAs per research

new: Charming thief using beauty and persuasion. Enhanced charm and deception abilities.

sum: Adds a Seducer thief kit focused on charm and domination abilities to control enemies, balanced by severe combat vulnerabilities and loss of standard thief skills.
no: Adds a Seducer thief kit focused on charm and domination abilities to control enemies, balanced by severe combat vulnerabilities and loss of standard thief skills.

co.no: Seducer thief kit. Mind-controlling infiltrator who casts charm, domination, and seduction spells instead of backstabbing. Cannot use armor or traps effectively.
